name: Solid Biosciences Inc.
business: Solid Biosciences is a life sciences company advancing a portfolio of gene therapy candidates for rare neuromuscular and cardiac diseases, including SGT-003 for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, SGT-212 for Friedreich's ataxia, SGT-501 for catecholaminergic polymorphic ventricular tachycardia, and SGT-601 for TNNT2-mediated dilated cardiomyopathy. The company also licenses its proprietary POLARIS-101 capsid to third parties.
sellsTo: patients with rare neuromuscular and cardiac diseases
corporate and academic partners for capsid licensing

exposures.sentence: We are a life sciences company focused on advancing a portfolio of current and future gene therapy candidates, which we refer to collectively as our Candidates, including SGT-003 for the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy (Duchenne), SGT-212 for the treatment of Friedreich's ataxia (FA), SGT-501 for the treatment of catecholaminergic polymorphic ventricular tachycardia (CPVT), SGT-601 for the treatment of TNNT2-mediated dilated cardiomyopathy (TNNT2 DCM), and additional assets for the treatment of genetic cardiac and neuromuscular diseases, at different stages of development, with varying levels of investment.

catalysts.event: Announced positive new interim data from Phase 1/2 INSPIRE DUCHENNE trial
catalysts.sentence: On March 11, 2026, we announced positive new interim data from the Phase 1/2 INSPIRE DUCHENNE clinical trial.

catalysts.event: Anticipated first participant dosing in Phase 3 IMPACT DUCHENNE trial
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate dosing the first participant in the Phase 3 IMPACT DUCHENNE trial in April 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial data from FALCON trial of SGT-212 anticipated
catalysts.sentence: Initial data anticipated in the second half of 2026, subject to participant enrollment.

catalysts.event: First participant dosing and initial safety data for ARTEMIS trial of SGT-501
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate dosing our first participant in the second quarter of 2026 with initial safety data anticipated in the second half of 2026, subject to participant enrollment.

catalysts.event: FDA meetings for accelerated approval pathway for SGT-003 and regulatory/clinical updates
catalysts.sentence: In the first half of 2026, we plan to have additional meetings with the FDA to receive guidance on a potential accelerated approval pathway for SGT-003 and we expect to provide regulatory and clinical updates in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Process performance qualification manufacturing batches to be completed
catalysts.sentence: with our process performance qualification manufacturing batches to be completed in 2026.

catalysts.event: Capsid selection from first library anticipated
catalysts.sentence: with capsid selection from the first library anticipated in the second half of 2026.
